items.title: Earnings live: IBM stock surges, Whirlpool slides; Meta, Microsoft, Tesla report beats across the board
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Caterpillar Earnings Are Coming. The Bar Is High Thanks to AI.
items.description: Investors have been focused on the company’s power-generation business amid a boom in AI data center construction.

items.title: American Intelligence & Power Forms Strategic Alliance with Caterpillar and Boyd CAT to Deploy 2 Gigawatts of Dedicated Power for Hyperscale AI Infrastructure
items.description: American Intelligence & Power Corporation ("AIP Corp"), Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT), and Boyd CAT today announced a strategic alliance and the execution of a purchase agreement supporting the development of AIP Corp's flagship site, the Monarch Compute Campus ("Monarch"), a large-scale, multi-phase power generation and infrastructure platform designed to deliver long-term, high-reliability power solutions to hyperscale and enterprise data center customers.

items.title: Why a $3 Million Shift Toward International Equities Stands Out in a Mega-Cap Portfolio
items.description: The iShares MSCI ACWI ex U.S. ETF offers diversified exposure to developed and emerging international equity markets through a single vehicle.

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The S&P 500 briefly surpassed 7,000 for the first time on Wednesday, but ended the day near the flatline after the Federal Reserve held steady on rates.
